title: CyberSim Arena
description: A dual-mode cybersecurity simulation game built with React, Python, and Claude. A user can choose between red team (offense) or blue team (defense) roles. The red team attempts to breach a simulated network using various attack techniques with a ML opponent that utilizes Isolation Forest anomaly detection, while the blue team implements defensive measures to protect the network with a ML opponent uses Markov chain modeling. The game features real-time feedback via Claude, interactive scenarios with varying difficulty levels, and a dynamic scoring system based on the success of attacks and defenses. Players can learn about cybersecurity concepts and strategies in an engaging, gamified environment.
shortDescription: A dual-mode cybersecurity simulation game built with React, Python, and Claude.
